title: WynnCopilot
description: AI companion for Wynncraft — gear advice, quest guidance, and lore right in your chat overlay
body:
# WynnCoPilot

  Your AI companion for Wynncraft. Get personalized gear advice, spoiler-free quest guidance, and lore deep-dives — all
  from your in-game chat overlay.

  ## Features

  - **Gear Advisor** — Upgrade recommendations based on your class, level, and skill build
  - **Quest Guide** — Spoiler-safe quest help that knows what you've completed
  - **Lore Companion** — Deep-dive into Wynncraft's storylines without spoilers
  - **In-Game Overlay** — No alt-tabbing. Press backtick to chat
  - **Powder Advisor** — Element and tier recommendations for your bracket

  ## Requirements

  - Minecraft **1.21.11** (Java Edition)
  - [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) **0.18.4+**
  - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
  - [Wynntils](https://modrinth.com/mod/wynntils) **4.0.4+**
  - Java **21+**

  ## How It Works

  1. Install the mod alongside Wynntils
  2. Join `play.wynncraft.com`
  3. Press **backtick (`)** to open the chat bar
  4. Ask anything — gear, quests, lore, powders


  ## Links

  - [Website](https://wynncopilot.vercel.app)
